历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8299 → 7693 → 7897 → 10843 → 10347. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao model transition, the ranking significantly dropped to 10843, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 10347. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about 10000–10800. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 10347. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 54 from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 63 in 2024, and slightly decreased to 62 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 62, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings stable in the 75–84 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The university has no significant negative or positive events in reputation evaluation documents, with stable public opinion. Its Douyin school heat total ranking is not in the top 106, with average short video exposure and normal application attention. The Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (nationally leading), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, with prominent characteristics in the power industry, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was highly recommended in 2024, Energy and Power Engineering majors recommended (66.43), Computer Science recommended (67.8), and power-related engineering majors have continuously rising social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao takers in the province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 113,900, slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch is 360 points (unchanged from 2024–2025), and the special type control line is 472 points (2025), with stable provincial control lines. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Heilongjiang, with no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation in the 10000–10800 range, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight decrease of about 3% in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the continuous rise in popularity of power-related majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 10347. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10377, with a range of 9877–10877.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<9877), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>10877), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
